title: Add Advertisements Section to Suraj Navodaya App

requirements.text: Add an Ads/Advertisements data model to the backend with fields: id (Nat), title (Text), description (Text), imageUrl (Text), linkUrl (Text), isActive (Bool), and createdAt (Int). Implement addAd, getAllAds, and toggleAdActive CRUD functions in the main actor.

quotes: Is app mein ads bhi Jod dena

acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor exposes addAd, getAllAds, and toggleAdActive functions
Ad records include id, title, description, imageUrl, linkUrl, isActive, and createdAt fields
getAllAds returns all stored ads sorted by creation date

requirements.text: Add React Query hooks for advertisements: useGetAds (fetch all ads), useAddAd (add a new ad mutation with cache invalidation), and useToggleAd (toggle active status mutation) in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts.

quotes: Is app mein ads bhi Jod dena

acceptanceCriteria: useGetAds hook fetches all ads from the backend actor
useAddAd mutation invalidates the ads query cache on success
useToggleAd mutation toggles the isActive field and invalidates the ads cache

requirements.text: Create a new Advertisements page (frontend/src/pages/Advertisements.tsx) that displays active ads as visually styled banner cards with title, description, and an optional external link. Include an admin dialog form to add new ads with fields: title, description, image URL, and link URL. Use the existing maroon-and-gold theme consistent with the rest of the app.

quotes: Is app mein ads bhi Jod dena

acceptanceCriteria: Advertisements page renders a list of active ad banner cards
Each card shows title, description, and a clickable external link if linkUrl is provided
An 'Add Advertisement' dialog form allows entering title, description, imageUrl, and linkUrl
Empty state is shown using the EmptyState component when no ads exist
Page uses maroon-and-gold color tokens consistent with the rest of the app

requirements.text: Add an 'Advertisements' navigation entry to the Header component (desktop nav buttons and mobile hamburger menu) and wire up the active page state in App.tsx to render the Advertisements page when selected.

quotes: Is app mein ads bhi Jod dena

acceptanceCriteria: Header desktop nav includes an 'Advertisements' button
Header mobile hamburger menu includes an 'Advertisements' item
App.tsx renders the Advertisements page when the 'Advertisements' nav item is active

requirements.text: Display a horizontal scrolling or grid preview of active ads on the Home dashboard page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx), similar to how recent notices and upcoming exams are previewed, with a 'View All' navigation callback to the Advertisements page.

quotes: Is app mein ads bhi Jod dena

acceptanceCriteria: Home page shows a preview section for active ads
A 'View All' button navigates to the Advertisements page
If no active ads exist, the preview section is hidden or shows a brief empty message

constraints: Maintain the existing maroon-and-gold Navodaya visual theme throughout all new UI components
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor
nonGoals: Third-party ad networks or programmatic advertising integrations (e.g., Google AdSense)
Image upload — image URLs are entered as text fields only
